title: Resources of the Wyld
description: The custom resourcepack made to bring together the Survival of the Wyld modpack into one artstyle and fix visual glitches with mods.
body:
A very **work in progress** resourcepack contains all the modified textures and sounds needed to bring together the [**Survival of the Wyld**](https://modrinth.com/project/KahqGy8y) modpack with all the other mods and resourcepacks!

Overall tries to make modded items and blocks look 32x to fit in more with the [Alacrity](https://modrinth.com/project/PUUpX2qq) resourcepack. Also changes the music from [Mob Battle Music](https://modrinth.com/project/pAmItJ0c) into more fitting, spooky, music.

I also modified some sounds from the various mods and resourcepacks to fix any issues _(audio being in stereo instead of mono or just too loud and ear piercing like Sirenhead in the [Box of Horrors](https://modrinth.com/project/Nt0wLqt5) mod)_

**1.0 ONLY** - Makes [the End of Herobrine](https://modrinth.com/project/KLNkjT7v) mod compatible with the [Gray's Mob Overhaul(+ Fresh Animations)](https://modrinth.com/project/oEL766nd) and [Human Era Villagers](https://modrinth.com/project/u69nu00u) resourcepacks 

Again, it's still a work in progress so I'll be making lots of updates over time making more mods fit the [Alacrity](https://modrinth.com/project/PUUpX2qq) and the overall modpack artstyle.

[**It only makes sense with the other resourcepacks included!!**](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/usw201inv2s8hxs5lx0mw/resourcepacks.zip?rlkey=r85dgkne77b1w9ak2yp7p5p7g&st=9w9m6xs8&dl=0)
